message:
fix(tui/tests): replace frame-content assertions with model state checks in pressure scenario

test_artifact.rs:
- Replace assert_frame_contains("green"/"red") with assert_true checks on
  harness.is_degraded() state, since render output format changed and
  color strings are no longer reliable assertion targets
- Assertions now verify actual model semantics (degraded flag) rather than
  fragile rendered output matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
